summary: Completed comprehensive mobile-friendly testing of bijnisbooks retail management system at 375x667 viewport. All mobile features are working correctly including bottom navigation, responsive sidebar, Quick Actions grid, stat cards layout, POS page, Employees page, and dialog bottom-sheet style.
passed_tests: Mobile bottom navigation appears and works on 375px viewport - 5 nav items (Home, POS, Items, Sales, More)
Sidebar is hidden by default on mobile (has -translate-x-full class)
Sidebar opens via hamburger menu toggle
Sidebar opens via 'More' button in mobile bottom nav
Dashboard Quick Actions grid shows 4 columns on mobile (4x3 grid with 12 items)
Dashboard stat cards stack properly on mobile
Main content has 80px bottom padding to account for bottom nav
POS page layout is responsive - store selector, GST toggle visible on mobile
Employees page tabs are visible and scrollable on mobile
Employee cards stack properly on mobile
Barcode Generator dialog displays as bottom-sheet on mobile
Barcode Generator Select All button works correctly (30 items × 30 labels)
Add Employee dialog displays as bottom-sheet on mobile
Dialog forms are scrollable with all fields accessible
Sales History page is responsive with proper table layout
Mobile navigation buttons (Home, POS, Items, Sales, More) all functional

mobile_bottom_nav.details: 5 nav items visible at bottom (Home, POS, Items, Sales, More), positioned at y=582px with height 85px

sidebar_behavior.details: Hidden by default with -translate-x-full class, opens via hamburger menu or More button

dashboard_quick_actions.details: 4-column grid on mobile with 12 quick action buttons

dashboard_stat_cards.details: Cards stack in 2 columns on mobile, proper spacing

pos_page.details: Store selector, GST toggle (18% Incl), cart section all visible and usable

employees_page.details: Tabs (Emp/Apps) scrollable, employee cards stack properly, Add button full-width

barcode_generator.details: Dialog as bottom-sheet, Select All works (30 items selected), responsive layout

dialogs_modals.details: Dialogs display as bottom-sheets on mobile (max-sm:bottom-0), scrollable content, sticky footer

critical_code_review_comments: mobile.css has comprehensive responsive styles covering navigation, typography, cards, tables, forms, dialogs, and POS-specific layouts
MobileBottomNav component properly implements 5 nav items with data-testid attributes for testing
Dialog component correctly applies bottom-sheet style on mobile via max-sm: classes
Main content wrapper correctly applies 80px bottom padding for bottom nav clearance
Quick Actions grid uses responsive grid-cols-4 sm:grid-cols-6 md:grid-cols-8 for proper mobile layout
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile-friendly features fully tested at 375x667 viewport. Key components: MobileBottomNav.js (bottom navigation), mobile.css (responsive styles), dialog.jsx (bottom-sheet style). All mobile features working correctly - no issues found.
screenshots_taken: mobile_dashboard.png - Dashboard with Quick Actions and stats
mobile_sidebar_open.png - Sidebar opened via hamburger menu
mobile_add_employee_dialog.png - Add Employee dialog as bottom-sheet
mobile_dialog_scrolled.png - Dialog scrolled to show all fields
